nasb.text: Now when Ish-bosheth, Saul’s son, heard that Abner had died in Hebron, he lost courage, and all Israel was disturbed.

esv.text: When Ish-bosheth, Saul’s son, heard that Abner had died at Hebron, his courage failed, and all Israel was dismayed.

cnv.text: 掃羅的兒子伊施波設聽見押尼珥在希伯崙死了，就怕得手都發軟，以色列眾人也都驚惶失措。

ccb.text: 扫罗的儿子伊施波设听到押尼珥死在希伯仑，吓得手脚发软，整个以色列都震惊不已。
